fields.title: Verify ASRT allow-all semantics (empty allowedDomains)
fields.description:
CRITICAL: Current code may have wrong semantics!

In wrapCommandWithSandbox(), for allow-all we currently have network config with empty arrays. But ASRT README says empty allowedDomains = NO network access (block all).

Need to verify:
1. Check installed ASRT version behavior
2. For true 'allow-all': either omit network field entirely OR use explicit wildcard
3. Current code already omits network for allow-all - verify this is correct

If empty arrays block network, this explains confusing DNS failures in allow-all mode.

DoD: verify behavior + fix if needed + add comment explaining correct semantics
fields.close_reason: Verified ASRT allow-all semantics and added coverage for allowlist→allow-all reset
